title: hymenophyllum soriemersum
intro: Hymenophyllum soriemersum, also known as the lesser polypody, is a species of fern native to New Zealand and parts of Australia. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum soriemersum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can aid in soothing digestive problems, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
